race.comment: LEAP TO FAME (4) comes off a narrow and very brave second in the Hunter Cup after working hard. Terrific in three prior Victorian wins, two at Group 1 level. He is more dominant over further than this but his strike rate at the distance is strong and he has a Miracle Mile win on his resume. The low barrier should give him his chance. Last-start winner DON HUGO (1) has fared even better at the draw and he has the speed to take advantage. Held the lead and made LEAP TO FAME work when beating him in last year's Miracle Mile here. He'll look to do it again. HI MANAMEISJEFF NZ (5) is a Menangle mile specialist, winning 10 of 13 attempts. Came from the outside barrier to beat DON HUGO over the distance last month. Could upset the top pair. SPEAK THE TRUTH (3) brings winning form from Queensland. Draws well and won one of these qualifiers two years ago prior to his Miracle Mile placing. Include. Tough draw for CAPTAINS KNOCK (12) but he has been terrific on the country cups circuit of late.
